title: 空に釣り糸を垂らして

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm coming in. Yoohoo, Trainer, how's it going?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. That's great to hear. Staying positive is what matters, no
matter who you are.

Seiun Sky continues to look around the room restlessly, seemingly
unable to relax.
At the very least, it's clear that something is bothering her.
choice_data_list: Why don't we go out for some fresh air?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Now this is a sight to see. Is my trainer suggesting we go play
hooky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a plan, but what should we do? Sunbathing? Looking for
cats? Or maybe, just maybe... fishing?
choice_data_list: You got it, let's go fishing!

text_block_list.text: The two of us head out on a fishing trip. However...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You aren't very good at this, are you? Well, I guess I'm not one
to talk either. Nya-ha-ha!
choice_data_list:
You're in high spirits, considering our distinct
lack of any haul.

You're in high spirits, considering our distinct
lack of any haul.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh-heh. Do I look that way? Do I, now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Let me give you some words of wisdom—"Love fish, but love fishing
even more."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: It's not about what or how much you fish up. What's important is how you fish.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You can't just swing your rod haphazardly, nor can you rely on
strength alone to reel. You have to keep thinking—keep trying new
approaches.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Set your goal, collect intel, make preparations, and then try it out in
practice. By repeating this process, you learn what works and what
doesn't.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And when the bait you've been prepping finally catches them hook,
line, and sinker—it doesn't get better than that.
choice_data_list: It sounds a bit like how you run.
It sounds a bit like how you run.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Hm. Which part?
choice_data_list:
You know, how you prepare various strategies
to help you win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Come on, what're you saying? I think you of all people would know this by now, but I'm not that great of a racer, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I'm the kid of some famous G1 racer or anything... and I
got a pretty dubious rep around the academy, too. There isn't a drop
of ambition inside me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any lofty dreams. I just want to spend my days peacefully,
whiling the time away fishing! That's the kind of life I live.
choice_data_list: But don't you want to take home the gold?
But don't you want to take home the gold?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...The gold?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Wait a second... Are you really my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The trainer I know is a pushover rookie who lets me off the hook, no
matter what I say. Right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me... Are you actually a doppelganger that arose from the
swamp to take their place? Yikes.
choice_data_list: I'm your trainer—the one and only.
I'm your trainer—the one and only.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Right, of course... Then how come—
choice_data_list: I'm your trainer, so I want to support you.
I'm your trainer, so I want to support you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Hey. Anyone ever tell you that you sometimes say the darndest
things?

For a while, Seiun Sky and I simply sit together in silence with both
our fishing lines cast into the water.
Some time passes...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You know... I get it, I really do. This is the part where I open up to
you, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The part where I drop a sob story about how I'm not talented enough
to reach my dreams, or that I just wasn't born with the right build to
go pro.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I still think it's... well, wouldn't it be boring for me to just put
down my rod and give up?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I studied, pondered, pondered some more, and prepared
all sorts of bait and techniques.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Then one day, I finally reeled in a big one. No one ever expected me to catch something that impressive!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, that was fun! I was on cloud nine! You should've seen everyone's
faces, with their mouths hanging open in awe!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: They were all like, "She caught that?! But how?! There's just no way!"
choice_data_list: So that's the source of your strength.
So that's the source of your strength.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder why.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I'm not really one for the overzealous sportsmanship.
Y'know, passion, guts, hard work! ...All that exhausting hype.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But still, for some reason... I can't stop thinking about how I felt in
that moment.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Just to be clear, I'm talking about fishing—but you knew that.
choice_data_list: Let's reel in some big ones together, okay?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Whoa there, me. Gotta go back to my happy-go-lucky mode.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't we go hit the training track? I suddenly have the urge
to move my legs a bit.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
B-but don't get the wrong idea! I'm not saying I'll listen to your
coaching from now on, or anything like that!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Just kidding. I tried to play coy there. How was that? Was I cute?
Tee-hee! ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Wait a sec...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
For starters... you're gonna have to learn not to take my jokes at face
value.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Please, I'm begging you. We gotta work on our coordination, don't
we?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: After all, we're gonna need it to reel in a big one!

Later, Seiun Sky and I finally complete our first training session
together.
